overview: The strongest supportive currents come through Rahu and Ketu. Pressure points are tied to Shani and need measured handling. Mixed stretches are shaped by Guru and need timing awareness.
yearlyTheme: For those born under Meena Rashi, the Sri Parabhava Nama Samvatsaram (March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027) promises a year of significant growth and fulfillment, primarily driven by the benevolent influence of Jupiter (Guru). You will distinguish yourself as a capable and respected head of the household, finding deep satisfaction in supporting and caring for your relatives, whose love and affection you will enjoy in abundance. This period favors the acquisition of new vehicles and the attainment of all worldly comforts through your own dedicated efforts, including the noble opportunity to ensure the complete well-being and comfort of your elderly parents during their twilight years. While you will enjoy financial gains from fixed assets and lead a life of cultured refinement, a particularly golden period awaits between June 10, 2026, and November 15, 2026, bringing exceptional luck, fame, and success—especially for students and those in educational sectors. Although a brief challenging phase from November 16, 2026, to January 31, 2027, may bring hidden opposition or professional stagnation despite your hard work, the year concludes on a high note with a return to peak prosperity from February 1, 2027. Please note, however, that these positive results may be reversed for individuals whose personal birth charts feature Jupiter positioned in Capricorn (Makara Rashi).
opportunities: While you will enjoy financial gains from fixed assets and lead a life of cultured refinement, a particularly golden period awaits between June 10, 2026, and November 15, 2026, bringing exceptional luck, fame, and success—especially for students and those in educational sectors. During the Sri Parabhava Nama Samvatsaram, Rahu will generally bring favorable financial results for Meena Rashi individuals.
caution: You may experience health issues related to gastric or joint pains (Vata imbalances), unexplained weight loss, and a mind burdened by restless, conflicting thoughts. Financial inflows may not meet your expectations, and you should exercise extreme caution regarding real estate; transactions involving land or property could lead to potential losses during this period.

For April 2026, Meena Rashi individuals may continue to face some hurdles in their ongoing projects, with family dynamics yielding average results and paternal matters potentially causing minor mental stress.
healthWellbeing: Throughout this year, Saturn’s influence may bring several adverse effects, particularly regarding physical and mental well-being. You may experience health issues related to gastric or joint pains (Vata imbalances), unexplained weight loss, and a mind burdened by restless, conflicting thoughts.
blessing: In summary, for the Sri Parabhava Nama Samvatsaram, the planetary landscape for Meena Rashi is largely positive. While Jupiter (Guru), Rahu, and Ketu offer favorable outcomes and growth, Saturn (Shani) remains the primary source of challenges due to the ongoing Sade Sati phase.

planetaryInfluences.summary: For those born under Meena Rashi, the Sri Parabhava Nama Samvatsaram (March 19, 2026, to April 6, 2027) promises a year of significant growth and fulfillment, primarily driven by the benevolent influence of Jupiter (Guru). You will distinguish yourself as a capable and respected head of the household, finding deep satisfaction in supporting and caring for your relatives, whose love and affection you will enjoy in abundance. This period favors the acquisition of new vehicles and the attainment of all worldly comforts through your own dedicated efforts, including the noble opportunity to ensure the complete well-being and comfort of your elderly parents during their twilight years. While you will enjoy financial gains from fixed assets and lead a life of cultured refinement, a particularly golden period awaits between June 10, 2026, and November 15, 2026, bringing exceptional luck, fame, and success—especially for students and those in educational sectors. Although a brief challenging phase from November 16, 2026, to January 31, 2027, may bring hidden opposition or professional stagnation despite your hard work, the year concludes on a high note with a return to peak prosperity from February 1, 2027. Please note, however, that these positive results may be reversed for individuals whose personal birth charts feature Jupiter positioned in Capricorn (Makara Rashi).

For Meena Rashi individuals, the Sri Parabhava Nama Samvatsaram continues to be dominated by the challenging phase of Sade Sati (Elinati Shani), which will persist until August 2029. Throughout this year, Saturn’s influence may bring several adverse effects, particularly regarding physical and mental well-being. You may experience health issues related to gastric or joint pains (Vata imbalances), unexplained weight loss, and a mind burdened by restless, conflicting thoughts. It may become increasingly difficult to honor your commitments to others during this time. Those in the political arena should be especially wary, as significant setbacks are possible. Dr. Aravind Sidhanthi advises against any attempts to undermine or harm your opponents; such negative intentions or "traps" are likely to backfire and cause you self-inflicted harm.

During the Sri Parabhava Nama Samvatsaram, Rahu will generally bring favorable financial results for Meena Rashi individuals. While wealth accumulation remains strong, there is a significant warning to stay vigilant against negative influences or harmful habits, as "bad company" could lead to the wasteful expenditure of your hard-earned money. For those in the agricultural sector, this period promises an abundance of wealth and crops, and you are also likely to receive notable benefits or support through your elder siblings. However, Dr. Aravind Sidhanthi notes a specific caution for those who have Kala Sarpa Dosha in their personal birth charts: you may encounter challenges related to your children. Their health issues or general well-being could become a source of mental anxiety, requiring your extra care and attention during this time.

For those born under Meena Rashi, the influence of Ketu throughout the Sri Parabhava Nama Samvatsaram will be largely favorable, fostering a life filled with energy and enthusiasm. You will find significant benefits through spiritual practices and Mantra Upasana, which will provide you with mental strength and clarity. Although you may encounter brief periods of uncertainty or fluctuations in your professional life, these will be short-lived, and new avenues for income will quickly manifest. Remarkably, whenever a financial need arises, help will reach you in one form or another, ensuring your requirements are met just in time.

monthlyHighlights.summary: During this month, challenging conditions are likely to persist for Meena Rashi individuals. Financial inflows may not meet your expectations, and you should exercise extreme caution regarding real estate; transactions involving land or property could lead to potential losses during this period.

For April 2026, Meena Rashi individuals may continue to face some hurdles in their ongoing projects, with family dynamics yielding average results and paternal matters potentially causing minor mental stress. While your professional and business income remains moderate, this month marks a positive turn for career growth as new job opportunities emerge and previous stagnation in marriage negotiations begins to clear. Your intuition will be remarkably sharp during this time, and while students may find competitive exams challenging, persistence will lead to securing desired educational seats at the last minute. This is a particularly favorable month for scientists and researchers, though Dr. Aravind Sidhanthi advises tempering any authoritative tendencies toward others to maintain harmony. For those planning travel, the North remains a favorable direction, but please exercise caution and avoid major initiatives on the 10th, 19th, and 25th, as these dates are not auspicious.

For May 2026, this month presents a blend of significant achievements and necessary health precautions. While it is not an auspicious time for home construction or applying for property-related loans, you will possess the determination and focus to successfully complete any other task you undertake. Financial stability is well-indicated, ensuring no shortage of funds for your requirements, and the second week stands out as particularly rewarding with opportunities for honors and public recognition. This period is especially favorable for those born under the Revati Nakshatra and tech professionals, while those seeking foreign travel will find the timing ideal. However, Dr. Aravind Sidhanthi advises caution regarding your health during the third week, as minor ailments may arise, potentially requiring a small surgical procedure. While efforts related to progeny may face setbacks this month, the final week brings relief as misunderstandings with your spouse clear up, paving the way for signing successful new agreements.

For June 2026, the positive momentum continues as this month promises excellent financial returns and domestic prosperity. You can expect significant gains from inherited property or the acquisition of a new home, and those in business will likely see profits that exceed their expectations. Your personal life will be filled with joy and happiness, providing ample opportunities to participate in vibrant social gatherings and celebrations. While you may find yourself reconsidering certain decisions at the last minute, these intuitive shifts will ultimately work in your favor. Dr. Aravind Sidhanthi notes that between the 16th and 19th, you will need to manage a sudden increase in responsibilities. While most new investments made this month are destined for profit, you should specifically avoid starting any new ventures related to home decor or interior design businesses. For students, this is a brilliant period for academic growth, particularly for those with an interest in Mathematics, who may achieve exceptional mastery in the subject.

For July 2026, the month begins with several emotional and practical challenges that will require significant patience and resilience. Women, in particular, may face situations that cause emotional distress, and you might find that your ongoing projects hit a standstill while your clarity of thought feels temporarily clouded. It is a period that will test your patience, making it vital to value the opinions of others and remain mindful of your surroundings. Dr. Aravind Sidhanthi advises extreme caution regarding vehicles, as there are indications of unexpected accidents during this time. While you will remain sharp enough to counter others' arguments effectively, real relief arrives after the 25th of the month, when your hard work finally begins to yield results and financial gains manifest. This month is notably favorable for historians and those in the antique or archaeology business, though everyone should be wary of the 2nd, 7th, 13th, and 15th, as these dates are considered inauspicious.

monthlyHighlights.summary: For August 2026, the month presents a mix of results, primarily focused on internal stability and persistence. You may find your mind wavering due to the persistence of negative thoughts, leading to a sense of restlessness; Dr. Aravind Sidhanthi suggests that seeking medical advice or professional counseling may be necessary to manage this mental anxiety effectively. While your financial income remains average and you may face some tensions within family affairs, your professional skills might not receive the recognition they truly deserve this month. Despite hurdles in your initial efforts, a positive shift in circumstances is expected to arrive starting from the final week. Notably, marriage-related efforts undertaken between the 7th and 11th are likely to be highly successful. By remaining open to and patiently listening to the opinions of others, you will find yourself gaining unexpected benefits and clarity.

For September 2026, the month presents significant challenges that require immense mental fortitude and caution in all dealings. You may receive distressing news that causes emotional pain, and unnecessary disputes could lead to further mental worry. Dr. Aravind Sidhanthi advises being extremely vigilant regarding financial matters, as there is a risk of monetary loss through people you know. Specifically, between the 5th and 15th, professionals may face severe instability or even the risk of job loss, making it vital to remain composed and diligent. Those with pre-existing liver-related health issues must take extra precautions during this time. While you may feel a lack of luck in your endeavors and face emotional distress due to rejection from a female figure, focusing your mind on worldly duties and practical responsibilities will eventually help you find the mental peace you seek.

For October 2026, the month brings a stabilizing influence where your professional skills and capabilities will finally gain the recognition they deserve. While your financial income remains moderate, you will find yourself in a position of emotional strength, displaying the grace to forgive even your harshest rivals. This is an excellent time for open communication with family elders; important discussions will go as planned, leading to the long-awaited resolution of deep-seated family issues. Dr. Aravind Sidhanthi notes that while new business ventures will yield average results, professionals will successfully meet their targets and objectives. However, be mindful that travel may lead to exhaustion, and there is a strong warning to avoid any form of gambling or lotteries, as they are likely to result in losses. Most importantly, do not commit to guarantees or promises that exceed your practical capacity or social standing.

For November 2026, the positive momentum continues as you experience favorable outcomes across various aspects of your life. This is an excellent month for financial recovery; profits from your profession or business will enable you to clear outstanding debts, and almost every financial initiative you undertake is likely to succeed, including the recovery of long-pending dues. While the 13th through the 16th promise strong income and the arrival of joyful news, Dr. Aravind Sidhanthi advises caution during the third week, as friction with your spouse's side of the family may cause some distress. This month is not particularly ideal for initiating marriage proposals or efforts regarding progeny. However, it is an exceptionally rewarding time for psychiatrists and mental health professionals, who will find great success in instilling confidence and peace in their patients. While the middle of the month is prosperous, please note that the 19th, 20th, 21st, and 22nd are not very favorable for major activities.

For December 2026, the month brings a surge in financial prosperity and complete domestic harmony, making it a fulfilling period for your family life. Younger individuals can expect significant career growth, while those aspiring for opportunities abroad will find their efforts yielding successful results. Your reputation and respect within the workplace are set to rise; however, Dr. Aravind Sidhanthi highlights a specific experience for those born under the Purvabhadra Nakshatra, who may encounter unexpected personal events that serve as a stark lesson on the dangers of over-trusting undeserving individuals. While professionals in the arts and creative fields will see excellent progress, this is a crucial time to strengthen your mental fortitude. You may find yourself feeling deep guilt even when others are hurt by mere accidents or misunderstandings; it is advised to let go of this oversensitive nature to maintain your inner peace.

For January 2027, the year begins on a high note with excellent health and the successful resolution of long-standing rivalries. This is a particularly auspicious month for job seekers, as you are likely to secure your desired employment, while those already in their professions will see a welcome increase in income. You will finally be able to complete pending home construction projects and may find yourself purchasing new household items or luxuries. While the period between the 10th and 14th is exceptionally favorable for marriage-related efforts, and your relationship with your spouse will generally bring mental peace, Dr. Aravind Sidhanthi advises avoiding criticism even if your partner disagrees with you. By patiently listening and understanding the perspectives of others, you will maintain harmony. Furthermore, seeing your grown children achieve significant milestones in their careers will bring you immense pride and joy during this month.

For February 2027, the month unfolds with highly favorable outcomes across all sectors of life. Students will find this period particularly supportive for their academic pursuits, while individuals from all walks of life can expect a very satisfying level of financial income. Business ventures will continue to be profitable, and the home environment will be filled with joy as auspicious functions or celebrations are successfully conducted. Professionally, you are likely to reach a new height in your career, enjoying both elevated status and increased authority. Dr. Aravind Sidhanthi notes that efforts related to purchasing vehicles, marriage proposals, or expanding your family through progeny are all destined for success this month. Specifically, for those born under the Purvabhadra Nakshatra, your innate humanity and exceptional memory will shine brightly, proving to be a massive asset during interviews and competitive assessments. This is also a golden period for those aspiring to or working within Central Government services, as peak results are indicated.

As the Telugu year draws to a close, your long-standing efforts regarding a change of residence or family relocation are likely to meet with success. Financial gains are indicated through your spouse or life partner, providing a welcome boost to your resources. However, Dr. Aravind Sidhanthi highlights specific challenges for those in the gold and jewelry trade, as you may face complications or hurdles related to government regulations or official documentation.

notes: OCR used page 1 of the local PDF capture.
Match status is based on heading, available metrics, available annual section markers, and first month marker.
